title: The Optimization From The Fog
description: An optimization modpack made for "the man from the fog" a horror mod
body:
What is The "The Optimization from the fog"? Well The Optimization From The Fog is a modpack made for the mod "the man from the fog"

What's diffrent between the man from the fog and the optimization from the fog? Well nothing much really it still uses the same mod but this modpack helps the man from the fog be more optimized for higher performance

Will this change any features of the mod? No this will not change or mess with any features with the man from the fog.

Will this project come to curseforge? No it will not come to curseforge I refuse to do so and if there is its most likely someone has copied and posted my modpack on there.
